title: Standard Return Request
ticket: I bought a sweater last week (order #45678) but it doesn't fit. Can I return it for a refund? I still have all the tags on it.

title: Lost Package
ticket: My order #78901 shows delivered 3 days ago but I never received it. I checked with neighbors and my building's mailroom. What can I do?

title: Cancel Order Before Shipment
ticket: I just placed order #11223 about 30 minutes ago but I need to cancel it. I ordered the wrong size. Can you cancel it?

title: Item Damaged in Transit
ticket: Order #33445 arrived today but the glass vase inside was shattered. The box looked fine from outside but the item is completely broken. I have photos.

title: Expired Coupon Code
ticket: I'm trying to use code SUMMER20 but it says expired. I received the email last month. Can you still honor it?

title: Received Wrong Item
ticket: I ordered a blue shirt (order #55667) but received a red one instead. I need the blue one for an event next week.

title: Payment Declined
ticket: I'm trying to place an order but my credit card keeps getting declined. I know there's money on it. What's wrong?

title: Gift Card Not Working
ticket: I received a $50 gift card for my birthday but when I try to use it at checkout, it says invalid code. The code is GC123456789.

title: Tracking Not Updated
ticket: My order #99887 was supposed to arrive yesterday with standard shipping. Tracking hasn't updated in 5 days. Order was placed 10 days ago.

title: Incomplete Order
ticket: I received my order #44556 today but only got 2 of the 3 items I ordered. The packing slip shows all 3 items but one is missing from the box.

title: Missing Loyalty Points
ticket: I made a purchase last week (order #77889) for $150 but the points haven't shown up in my account yet. When will I get them?
expected_elements: Points post within 24 hours of delivery

title: Price Match Request
ticket: I bought a TV yesterday for $599 (order #22334) but I just saw it on BestBuy.com for $549. Can you match that price?

title: Defective Product Within Warranty
ticket: I bought a coffee maker 3 months ago (order #66778) and it stopped working. It just won't turn on anymore. Is this covered under warranty?

title: International Delivery Question
ticket: I want to order a gift for my friend in Canada. Do you ship there and how long does it take?

title: Cannot Access Account
ticket: I can't log into my account. I tried resetting my password but I'm not receiving the reset email. My email is correct in the system.
